economic_mechanism: Search materially independent market, cross-asset, and corporate-information mechanisms that can support a one-lot defined-risk option expression for the $3,000 sleeve; each mechanism must earn advancement under a frozen train-only discovery bar rather than inherit authority from the search factory.
forecast_type: free multi-mechanism direction, volatility, or time-bias discovery with one named decision per wake
candidate_or_family_scope: Successor search sequence beginning with MONTHLY_SECTOR_LEADER_CONTINUATION_BULL_CALL_35D_V1 / SECTOR_ALLOCATION_RELATIVE_STRENGTH_CONTINUATION at 2026-07-16T0335 and CREDIT_RISK_OFF_SPY_BEAR_PUT_21D_V1 / HIGH_YIELD_CREDIT_DIVERGENCE_FORWARD_DOWNSIDE at 2026-07-16T0408; both exact families are closed, and the next decision must use a materially different mechanism or evidence class.
falsifier: Each wake must close its predeclared named candidate or family under frozen chronology, control, density, uncertainty, tail, integrity, capital, and authority boundaries. Two consecutive counted wakes without STRATEGY_ADVANCED require a materially different mechanism/evidence-class pivot; three require burst stop and reassessment.
epoch_success_definition: Advance one named candidate at least from F0_MECHANISM to F1_TRAIN under its frozen discovery bar while preserving sealed holdout identities and claim-appropriate authority boundaries; capability or plumbing alone is not success.
next_seed: SEC_FORM4_CLUSTERED_INSIDER_BUYING_DIRECTION_F0: freeze a fixed liquid panel, official point-in-time Form 4 open-market-purchase/ownership/amendment/issuer rules, prior-only controls, signed horizon, complete one-lot call-debit Layered Edge Stack, and train advance-or-close gates before outcomes; exercise the named decision in the same wake and fail closed on ambiguous derivatives, late filings, issuer mapping, amendments, or density.
